title: The Red Mist sword Mimicry
description: Replaces any swords or axes with a Red Mist sword from the Project Moon universe.
body:
# The Red Mist sword Mimicry
**Replaces any swords or axes with a Red Mist sword from the Project Moon universe (Library of Ruina reference)**
### Rename weapon to Mimicry

![Renaming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efe25de3d6827420adf6d48a4dc636b595150b44.png)

### There is also an animated version. (outdated version, may not work)
![animated version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86e24f6df70d5e8d17c3a7f9ff64e151fce459d6.gif)
